mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-obOrderListManagerMapper-sql-oracle.xml - selectObOrdWkCnlList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 출고 현황 > 작업취소 - 취소주문 정보 조회 */ SELECT OH.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OH.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OH.OBORDKEY /*원주문코드*/ , OH.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드*/ , OH.WAHDKEY /*웨이브헤더코드*/ , OH.OBSTATUSCD /*출고상태*/ , CASE WHEN OH.WKTYPECD IS NULL THEN (CASE WHEN OH.ORDSEPTYPECD = '10' THEN 'UW' ELSE 'DW' END) ELSE OH.WKTYPECD END AS WKTYPECD /*작업유형*/ , OH.PREOBHDKEY /*이전릴리즈코드*/ , OH.WKCNLREQYN /*작업 취소 요청 여부*/ , COALESCE(WH.WAWKSTATUSCD, '00') AS WAWKSTATUSCD /*웨이브 작업 상태*/ , COALESCE(WH.CLASSIFPLANSNDYN, 'N') AS CLASSIFPLANSNDYN /*분류계획 전송여부*/ , (CASE WHEN OBSTATUSCD IN ('05','10') AND COALESCE(WH.CLASSIFPLANSNDYN, 'N') = 'N' THEN '97' ELSE NULL END) AS OBSTATUSCD_UP FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH ON OH.CTKEY = WH.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = WH.OWKEY AND OH.WAHDKEY = WH.WAHDKEY WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey}
